prompt: Flop K-K-3 rainbow. Choose CALL for the calmer board or RAISE for the more pressure-building board.
why_v1: A paired rainbow board usually stays calmer because fewer straight and flush draws are available.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. A paired rainbow flop usually stays calmer because fewer draw paths open up.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This flop is calmer because the paired texture limits immediate draw pressure.
recap_v1: Dry or paired boards usually stay calmer. Connected draw-heavy boards build more pressure and change future decisions faster.
